title: FOOGO Green 25pcs Disposable Palm Leaf Bowls, 5" (13cm) 19.4oz (550ml), for Soup, Desserts & Salad, Deep Square, Sturdy Eco Friendly Biodegradable, Bamboo, Wooden and Paper Bowls for Hot Food
features: STURDY - Does not bend or collapse under weight, hold your food confidently with one hand. Suitable for any type of food – hot, cold, dry, wet, sticky, sweet, spicy – you name it!
A true GIFT FROM NATURE – Made from naturally fallen Areca palm leaves, gently cleaned with water and heat pressed to desired shapes and sizes.
Ideal for birthday parties, wedding, camping, BBQ, picnic, home use, corporate and catering events
STYLISH, natural woody texture. Each product is uniquely different and a true reflection of the infinite shapes and manifestations of mother nature.
COMPOSTABLE and BIODEGRADABLE - When used dispose them along with food or garden waste.
MICROWAVE and FREEZER safe - FOOGO disposable plates are heat and cold resistant, and can be used for both hot and cold foods, making them perfect for any occasion.

One-stop-shop for ECO PARTY SUPPLIES - Our range of products includes party plates and cutlery sets, eco-friendly napkins, biodegradable straws, wooden cutlery sets, disposable bowls and serving trays.

A greener alternative. Old challenge. New solution. We believe that convenience shouldn't be at the cost of the planet. Decades of single-use plastic usage is having an adverse impact on the planet and this is our solution. Made from dried Areca palm leaves, we have turned an agricultural waste into stylish disposable tableware. Be good. Do good. We are Carbon Neutral. We offset all carbon emissions right from manufacturing, all the way to delivery to customers. We do this by actively contributing to green initiatives around the world, from generation of sustainable wind energy in India to provision of clean cookstoves in Uganda. Gift from nature. Perfectly imperfect. No chemicals, no nasties and nothing artificial. FOOGO Green tableware is hand crafted by rural men and women in India. Each piece is uniquely rustic and carries the distinct patterns and textures of the leaf it is made from. All occasions. Be it a wedding, corporate event or a backyard barbecue, our eco-conscious tableware is a sensible option. They are perfect for zero waste parties, picnics, camping and outside events where it may not be possible to wash-up afterwards. We don't use any chemicals to alter the natural properties of the leaves, hence the dishes may have a mild woody scent (the smell of dried palm leaves). However, this does not interfere with the smell or taste of food. Why are there colour variations, dark streaks and splotches on the products? No two leaves are the same, which means no two palm leaf dishes are the same. The colour variations, streaks and splotches are absolutely normal and are due to the natural variations in the leaves. Are leaf dishes microwave and oven safe? Are they fridge and freezer safe? We have used leaf dishes in microwave for 2 minutes at 800W and in the oven for 30 minutes at 180-degree C. They could be used at higher temperatures but please be cautious when doing so. Leaf plates and bowls are fridge and freezer safe. Can I clean and reuse palm leaf products? Palm leaf products are designed for one-time use, however many of our customers have said they have reused them. When used with non-sticky/non-greasy food, the plates and bowls can be wiped clean/washed, dried and reused. How can I store unused palm tableware? All unused products should be stored air-tight, to prevent the leaves from absorbing moisture from air.
